'''Kei''' was a [[Yevetha]]n [[Gender/Legends|female]], the first mate of [[Nil Spaar]], and the [[darna]] of his family. Her [[Mara-nas|birth-cask]] produced two [[nitakka]]—males—and one [[marasi]]—female—but eventually succumbed to the gray death. Spaar kept a breedery alcove at the royal palaces in [[Giat Nor]] empty in her honor and to assuage her jealousy of his many other mates. Kei accompanied her mate to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] aboard the [[Aramadia (Aramadia-class)|''Aramadia'']], and was last heard of aboard the [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Pride of Yevetha'']].
